title: Community platform update

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, monday.com community!

We’ve recently seen an increase in spam content across our forum.
To maintain the integrity and safety of our community, we’ve increased our security measures, which include a temporary post-approval process. This means that you may notice some of your posts will now require approval from our moderators before they appear on the forum., We aim to review and approve all posts within the working day. We understand this might cause a slight delay, and we appreciate your understanding and patience as we work to ensure our community remains a constructive and safe space for everyone.

As always, thank you for being part of our community and your commitment to making it a great place to connect and share!

posts.author: Terry.Heard (Terry Heard)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to be able to have questions answered or even acknowledged by Team Members from Monday. I have asked multiple times for follow up on a “Roadmap” item and have had no response.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Terry,

Sorry for the delay here. As you can image our product team is hard at work developing these apps and are not always able to give details about the the exact release timeline. As part of our new feature request process, our product team gives us an update on the latest features once a quarter or when they have significant updates. We are actually in the process of getting more updates from our product team and hope to have updates in the coming days. You can find more information about our community features request process here: All you need to know about our new Feature Request process
